summary: Iteration 6 testing completed successfully. All 6 requested features verified: 1) Dashboard cliente 'I Miei Dati' tab with full profile editing, 2) Profile save functionality working, 3) Modelli tributari with YouTube video thumbnails visible, 4) 'Conseguenze mancata presentazione' section correctly REMOVED from modelli, 5) /admin/models page with YouTube video editing, 6) Auto-classification of client into list when tipo_cliente changes. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working correctly.

issues: Minor console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement suggested

passed_tests: ✅ API Health Check - Fiscal Tax Canarie API accessible
✅ Cliente Login - Authentication working with correct credentials
✅ GET /api/auth/me - Returns extended profile fields (NIE, NIF, CIF, IBAN, indirizzo, città, CAP, provincia)
✅ PUT /api/auth/me - Cliente can update own profile successfully
✅ PUT /api/auth/me - Profile changes persisted correctly
✅ PUT /api/clients/{id} - tipo_cliente change auto-adds client to corresponding list (Autonomi/Società/Privati)
✅ GET /api/modelli-tributari - Returns modelli with video_youtube and video_thumbnail fields
✅ Modelli API response does NOT contain 'conseguenze_mancata_presentazione' field
✅ PUT /api/modelli-tributari/{id} - Can update modello with YouTube video URL
✅ YouTube thumbnail auto-generated from video URL (img.youtube.com/vi/{videoId}/mqdefault.jpg)
✅ POST /api/modelli-tributari - Can create new modello with video
✅ DELETE /api/modelli-tributari/{id} - Can delete modello
✅ Frontend: Tab 'I Miei Dati' visible in ClientDashboard
✅ Frontend: All profile fields present (Nome, Email, Telefono, NIE, NIF, CIF, Codice Fiscale IT, Indirizzo, Città, Provincia, CAP, IBAN)
✅ Frontend: 'Modifica' button enables edit mode
✅ Frontend: 'Salva Modifiche' and 'Annulla' buttons visible in edit mode
✅ Frontend: 'Guida Modelli' tab shows all modelli tributari
✅ Frontend: Modello dialog shows video thumbnail with play button overlay
✅ Frontend: Modello dialog does NOT show 'Conseguenze mancata presentazione' section
✅ Frontend: /admin/models page ('Gestione Modelli Tributari') accessible
✅ Frontend: Model cards show video thumbnails when set
✅ Frontend: Edit dialog has 'Video YouTube (opzionale)' input field
✅ Frontend: New model dialog has all required fields including video YouTube
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features tested and working. Cliente can edit profile via 'I Miei Dati' tab in ClientDashboard. PUT /api/auth/me endpoint allows clients to update: full_name, phone, codice_fiscale, nie, nif, cif, indirizzo, citta, cap, provincia, iban. Commercialista can edit modelli tributari at /admin/models with YouTube video support. Video thumbnails auto-generated. 'Conseguenze mancata presentazione' field removed from API response (ModelloTributarioResponse model). Auto-classification works: changing tipo_cliente adds client to corresponding list (Autonomi/Società/Privati).

ui_sections: Dati Personali: Nome Completo, Email (readonly), Telefono
Identificazione Fiscale: NIE, NIF, CIF, Codice Fiscale IT

modelli_youtube_video.ui_display: Thumbnail with red play button overlay in modello dialog

conseguenze_removed.check: API response ModelloTributarioResponse does NOT include 'conseguenze_mancata_presentazione' field
conseguenze_removed.frontend: Dialog does NOT show 'Conseguenze mancata presentazione' section

features: List all modelli tributari in card grid
Edit modello with all fields including video_youtube
Create new modello with video support
Video thumbnail preview in edit dialog

auto_classification.behavior: Client automatically added to corresponding list (Autonomi/Società/Privati)
auto_classification.list_creation: Lists created automatically if not existing
